# Atr Ftir

**Summary**: A spectroscopic technique used to identify the chemical composition and polymer types of materials.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] used ATR-FTIR to identify microplastic polymer types like PET, PE, and HDPE.

## Key Results and Findings

- Identified four different polymers: Polyethylene terephthalate (PET), Polyethene (PE), High Density Polyethylene (HDPE), and Polypropylene (PP). ([[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022, p. 38]])
